dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dark Cloud Cover pattern translated as: (1) Price in uptrend (close > sma_20), (2) Previous candle white/bullish (close > prev_close), (3) Current candle black/bearish (close < prev_close), (4) Black candle opens above white candle's close (open > prev_close). Exit when price closes above open (reversal). AUTHOR_SILENT exit conditions replaced with standard reversal logic.

backtest_rule.reason: Dark Cloud Cover pattern translated as: (1) Price in uptrend (close > sma_20), (2) Previous candle white/bullish (close > prev_close), (3) Current candle black/bearish (close < prev_close), (4) Black candle opens above white candle's close (open > prev_close). Exit when price closes above open (reversal). AUTHOR_SILENT exit conditions replaced with standard reversal logic.

source_rule_text: Dark Cloud Cover: A two-line candlestick pattern where a tall white candle is followed by a black candle, acting as a reversal of an uptrend
